text: Did the boy go where he wanted to?
zh: 那个男孩去了他想去的地方吗?

text: Children who play truant from school are unimaginative.
zh: 逃学的孩子都缺乏想象力。

text: or eight hours in a cinema seeing the same film over and over again, is usually as far as they get.
zh: 或者在电影院里把同一部片子反复看上八个小时,通常就是他们能想到的极限了。

text: They have all been put to shame by a boy who, while playing truant travelled 1, 600 miles.
zh: 有一个男孩却让他们都相形见绌,他逃学期间竟然跑了一千六百英里。

text: He hitchhiked to Dover and towards evening went into a boat to find somewhere to sleep.
zh: 他搭便车到了多佛,傍晚时分爬上一艘船想找地方过夜。

text: When he woke up next morning, he discovered that the boat had, in the meantime, travelled to Calais.
zh: 第二天早上醒来时,他发现船已经开到了加来。

text: No one noticed the boy as he crept off.
zh: 他偷偷溜下船时,没人注意到他。

text: From there, he hitchhiked to Paris in a lorry.
zh: 从那里,他搭一辆卡车的便车前往巴黎。

text: The driver gave him a few biscuits and a cup of coffee and left him just outside the city.
zh: 司机给了他几块饼干和一杯咖啡,把他放在了巴黎城外。

text: The next car the boy stopped did not take him into the centre of Paris as he hoped it would,
zh: 男孩拦下的下一辆车并没有像他希望的那样把他带进巴黎市中心,

text: but to Perpignan on the French-Spanish border.
zh: 而是把他带到了法国和西班牙边境的佩皮尼昂。

text: There he was picked up by a policeman and sent back to England by the local authorities.
zh: 在那里,他被一名警察发现,当地政府把他遣送回了英国。

text: He has surely set up a record for the thousands of children who dream of evading school.
zh: 对于成千上万梦想逃学的孩子来说,他无疑创下了一项纪录。
